visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man in a brown Roots hoodie and a flat cap stands in an urban park plaza. He holds a compact white drone, speaking enthusiastically with wide hand gestures. The background features green trees and multi-story residential buildings under a bright, overcast sky. (2) Close-up shots highlight the DJI Flip drone's sleek white body and its four rotors enclosed in black protective grilles. The creator's hands demonstrate the device's size and lightness, emphasizing its portability against a blurred city street backdrop with parked cars and motorcycles. (3) The creator activates the drone, which hovers steadily at head height. He walks across the paved square while the drone follows him automatically, maintaining a consistent distance. He later holds a gray DJI Mic device, demonstrating integration, and uses voice commands to trigger an orbital flight path around him.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 飛空拍機. [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: Instagram 3ctim. (2) [Slogan]: 不用那麼難. (3) [Slogan]: 不用手機!. (4) [Slogan]: 不用遙控器!. (5) [Variety]: DJI Flip. (6) [Slogan]: 不用考照!. (7) [Slogan]: DJI Flip 更輕 249g. (8) [Slogan]: 有防護網設計!. (9) [Variety]: 跟隨. [Variety]: 3 2 1. (10) [Slogan]: DJI Flip 視角. (11) [Slogan]: 語音來聲控它. [Variety]: 3 2 1.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, 2 distant passers-by in the background plaza.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a brown hooded sweatshirt with 'Roots' logo, a patterned flat cap, and tinted glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An urban plaza with grey stone tiling, surrounded by green leafy trees and typical Taiwanese residential apartments with balconies and air conditioning units.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male narrator speaks clearly in Traditional Chinese over a steady, upbeat electronic BGM with a distinct percussive beat. His delivery is fast and enthusiastic, typical of tech product reviews. Faint outdoor ambient noise is perceptible but remains well below the primary vocal signal. (2) Each visual text transition is accompanied by a sharp digital 'whoosh' or 'ding' sound effect. The BGM remains consistent in tempo and volume, providing a rhythmic backbone to the product feature listing. (3) A subtle, high-pitched mechanical whirring sound (the drone's propellers) is audible during flight segments. The narrator's voice remains the dominant acoustic element, maintaining a positive and authoritative valence until the concluding statement.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Specification Summary -> Practical Demo -> Integration Features -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate and promote the DJI Flip drone, emphasizing its user-friendly features such as controller-free operation, portability, and AI-driven tracking capabilities for casual users.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of the product name and features, including branding on screen.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly polished tech review video optimized for social media with fast cuts and bold text overlays.
